RULING: MATTER ARGUED. THE COURT OVERRULES DEFENDANT SETHNESS PRODUCTS COMPANY's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

Defendant Sethness Products Company'S Motion To Strike Complaint
Off Calendar Nov-20-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: DAVID HOFFNER, ESQ. AND LAURENCE HAVESON, ESQ., 510.848.8880, FOR PLAINTIFF WHITNEY LEEMAN PHD.
GARY ROBERTS, ESQ., 213.892.5005, FOR DEFENDANT SETHNESS PRODUCTS COMPANY.

RULING: MATTER ARGUED. THE COURT GRANTS IN PART/DENIES IN PART DEFENDANT SETHNESS COMPANY'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT AS FOLLOWS: THE IDENTIFIED PORTIONS OF PARAGRAPHS 7, 32, 36 AND 37 ARE STRICKEN. THE BALANCE OF MOTION IS DENIED. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Oct-29-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATY. LAURENCE HAVESON OF THE CHANLER LAW GROUP, MOVING PARTY;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. VERIFIED APPLICATION OF DAVID S. HOFFER TO APPEAR AS COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE FOR THE PLAINTIFF WHITNEY LEEMAN is Granted. Plaintiff's September 12, 2013 application is denied as it does not comply with CRC 9.40. Plaintiff's "Supplemental Verified Application for Admission of David Hoffner" is granted as it complies with CRC 9.40. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Suzanne Crozier, CSR # 4761 =(302/MJM)
